name: Unusual Network Traffic Volume Detected
description: An unusually high volume of outbound network traffic has been detected, which could indicate an attempt at data exfiltration.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the network traffic event.

parameters.name: source_ip
parameters.description: The source IP address of the machine initiating the transfer.

parameters.name: dest_ip
parameters.description: The destination IP address of the server receiving the data.

parameters.name: source_port
parameters.description: The source port of the network connection.

parameters.name: dest_port
parameters.description: The destination port of the network connection.

parameters.name: protocol
parameters.description: The network protocol used (e.g., TCP, UDP, HTTP).

parameters.name: bytes
parameters.description: The total number of bytes transferred in the session.
